scope_note: Structural evidence-chain benchmark on sanitized fixtures; it does not measure forecast accuracy or investment returns.

cases.case_title: Source event is dated, cited, and economically interpreted
cases.source: Apple FY26 Q2 consolidated financial statements

checks.name: event_present
checks.detail: A material source event is present.

checks.name: citation_bound
checks.detail: At least one source URL is attached to the event.

checks.name: event_dated
checks.detail: The event has an explicit date.

checks.name: economic_relevance
checks.detail: The event states why it could affect the investment case.

checks.name: source_identified
checks.detail: A filing, issuer, or normalized source is identified.

cases.case_title: Thesis remains connected to source evidence

checks.name: idea_present
checks.detail: At least one research idea is present.

checks.name: idea_cited
checks.detail: The idea includes citations.

checks.name: source_events
checks.detail: The idea retains source events.

checks.name: thesis_written
checks.detail: A thesis statement is present.

checks.name: bounded_direction
checks.detail: Direction is one of Long, Short, Neutral, or Watch.

cases.case_title: Counter-thesis and falsification remain visible

checks.name: counter_evaluated
checks.detail: The strongest counter-thesis was evaluated.

checks.name: idea_cited
checks.detail: Counter-analysis remains source-bound.

checks.name: next_source
checks.detail: A falsification source or monitor is identified.

checks.name: driver_mapped
checks.detail: The thesis has a causal-driver mapping or explicit bridge status.

checks.name: stage_visible
checks.detail: The research stage is explicit.

cases.case_title: Monitoring, market context, and payoff gaps are explicit

checks.name: monitor_or_work_order
checks.detail: A monitor rule or executable next source is attached.

checks.name: market_capture
checks.detail: Market-capture mode is recorded.

checks.name: score_present
checks.detail: Research completeness is scored.

checks.name: direction_rationale
checks.detail: Direction has a rationale.

checks.name: payoff_or_gap
checks.detail: A payoff model or explicit payoff gap is recorded.

cases.case_title: Promotion gates cannot hide unsupported conviction

checks.name: no_unsupported_high_conviction
checks.detail: No unsupported idea is promoted.

checks.name: validation_present
checks.detail: Claim validation results are attached.

checks.name: evidence_ledger
checks.detail: An evidence ledger is attached.

checks.name: run_manifest
checks.detail: A reproducible run manifest is attached.

checks.name: one_pager
checks.detail: The IC one-pager is generated from the same result.
